theme.mood: Luxury, Streetwear, Premium, Confident, Modern, Minimal, Bold, Fashion Forward
theme.spacing_scale: Premium Generous (p-8 to p-32 depending on screen size)
theme.container_width: Large, edge-to-edge for media, max-w-screen-2xl for content

layout.navigation: Sticky header. Glassmorphism or solid stark background on scroll. Minimalist text links. Icons for search/cart. Logo prominently centered or left-aligned.
layout.hero: Full height (h-screen) image/video background. Minimal text overlay (bg-black/30 maximum if needed for contrast), large typography, subtle scroll indicator.
layout.collections_grid: Asymmetrical or bento grid. Edge-to-edge images with hover text reveal or stark labels underneath. No visible card boundaries.
layout.product_listing: 3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile. No borders. Image is 85% of card height. Text left-aligned below image. Hover: Swap image, show quick add.
layout.product_detail: Split screen desktop: Left side scrollable large images (2-grid or stack), Right side sticky product info. Minimalist accordion for details.
layout.cart_checkout: Slide-out drawer for cart. Clean, single-column checkout or stark split-screen.
layout.admin_panel: Dense, utility-first layout. Sidebar navigation. High contrast data tables. Monochromatic with subtle borders.

buttons.primary: bg-brand_primary text-white dark:text-black uppercase tracking-widest text-xs py-4 px-8 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity rounded-none
buttons.secondary: border border-brand_primary text-brand_primary uppercase tracking-widest text-xs py-4 px-8 hover:bg-brand_primary hover:text-white dark:hover:text-black transition-all rounded-none
buttons.link: underline underline-offset-4 decoration-1 hover:decoration-2 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

components.inputs: Border bottom only (border-b border-border) rounded-none bg-transparent focus:ring-0 focus:border-brand_primary pb-2 text-base
components.cards: No visible card wrapper. Product cards are just image + text layout. Use pure HTML/Tailwind.
components.modals: Backdrop blur, stark white/black box, no rounded corners. (Shadcn Dialog customized)
components.accordions: Border top/bottom only, minimal icon (plus/minus), uppercase headings. (Shadcn Accordion customized)

animations.page_transition: Fade in, slight scale up (Framer Motion).
animations.hover_product: Image scales slightly (scale-105) inside overflow-hidden wrapper, or second image cross-fades.
animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth scrolling. Elements fade/slide up on enter.

logo.description: THE LIONEYO (Text + Wing Motif) - assume local assets provided

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, dialogs, accordions, tabs) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case. Example: `data-testid='add-to-cart-button'`.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Pure white/black with high contrast. NO generic blues/greens.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body text (import via Fontshare). If unavailable, use Oswald and Inter.
For the homepage, build a minimalist edge-to-edge experience. Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for the product grid; build pure HTML/Tailwind for maximum aesthetic control.
Implement Shadcn for interactive logic (Modals, Selects, Accordions) but strip the default rounded styling to 0px. Make them look raw and editorial.
Every actionable element MUST include a `data-testid`.
Ensure dark mode support is implemented cleanly using Tailwind's `dark:` classes.
For Product Page (PDP): Mimic Overlays/Represent with large stacked imagery on the left, sticky details on the right.
Ensure hover states use image swapping or subtle scaling.
Admin panel should use Shadcn extensively for tables, forms, and tabs, keeping a dense, utility-first layout.
